rationale: The response immediately brakes the repeated local-overlay pattern, naming the recurring 'where it breaks, add another sentence' repair loop. It does provide an emergency SMS line for today, but frames it as a one-time rescue rather than the default ongoing fix, and explicitly says not to keep loading more rules into SMS. It moves upstream by consolidating entrance, signup, parking, and break flow into one arrival guide shared across invite/SMS/signage, satisfying the structural redesign/consolidation requirement. No fail signal of simply adding another reminder without triage is observed.
